description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa featuring a combination of mustard yellow and charcoal gray upholstery. The seat consists of a single, long cushion in mustard yellow, complemented by four loose throw pillows—two in matching yellow and two in a contrasting gray. The backrest is high and straight, with a tufted mustard yellow section that adds a touch of classic elegance. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and fully upholstered in gray, matching the sofa's exterior frame and back. The sofa stands on six short, turned legs, likely made of wood, providing stability and a subtle traditional accent.
description: A modern three-seater sofa with mustard yellow tufted upholstery, gray frame, and four loose pillows, supported by six short turned legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, medium-height gray armrest and the depth of the mustard yellow seat cushion with two pillows visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the sofa, tufted yellow backrest, four pillows, and all six legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the other gray armrest, seat cushion, and pillow arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, fully gray upholstered back and the tops of the pillows peeking above the backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One long, attached seat cushion in mustard yellow; four loose throw pillows (two yellow, two gray); backrest is tufted and integrated.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, medium-height armrests fully upholstered in gray fabric, flush with the backrest and seat, with a squared profile and subtle padding.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, turned legs, likely wooden, positioned at the corners and midpoints for support; legs are exposed and dark in color.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with mustard yellow tufted upholstery; integrated with the sofa frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a tufted pattern on the backrest; seat and armrests are smooth, with no visible decorative stitching except for the tufting.
